bpWarnings.reason: no form in scope for this case
no security privilege in scope for this case

unresolved: NoYes::No / NoYes::Yes (FALSE POSITIVE: kernel enum reported unknown-static-member)
Workflow::activateFromWorkflowType arity 4/5 (FALSE POSITIVE: last param has default = curUserId())

root_cause_hypothesis: Case content itself was reachable via the grounded path, but four write-path defects forced the create overwrite=true fallback three times: (1) d365fo_file(action="modify", operation="add-index") could not resolve ConDemoWfRequest created in the same session even with an explicit filePath and after update_symbol_index (bridge metadata roots fixed at startup); (2) d365fo_file(action="create", objectType="table") silently DROPPED the canSubmitToWorkflow method passed in sourceCode, writing <Methods />; (3) d365fo_file(action="create", objectType="query") omits <DynamicFields>Yes</DynamicFields> on a data source with an empty field list, producing a query that fails xppc with "The field list of the data source cannot be empty if the dynamic field is set to false"; (4) generate_object(mode="scaffold", objectType="table") ignored the structured fields[] array entirely (EDT hints and the enumType field were lost, wrong EDTs RequestId_NL/smmSubject were mined from fieldsHint), demanded fieldsHint even though fields[] was supplied, and WROTE the file to disk despite being documented as text-only generation. Secondary: d365fo_file(action="create", objectType="class") corrupts the class declaration doc comment, substituting the class name for a word after "class" ("The <c>X</c> class is the ..." became "The <c>X</c> class X the ..."). Also VALIDATOR_GAP: validate_code(mode="references") rejects the kernel enum literals NoYes::No/NoYes::Yes as unknown-static-member and reports arity-mismatch for a call that omits a parameter carrying a default value. The two remaining BP warnings are inherent to the case scope (no form, no privilege) and the spec was amended to allow them.
suggested_fix_area: src/tools/d365fo-file (table create: honour sourceCode methods; query create: emit DynamicFields; class create: stop rewriting declaration doc comments; modify: resolve same-session objects from disk when the bridge model misses them), src/tools/generate-object (scaffold table: honour fields[] over fieldsHint, do not write to disk in generate mode), src/validation/resolve-references (kernel enum literals, default-valued parameters in arity check)
